nasb.text: On the fifth day he arose to go early in the morning, and the girl’s father said, “Please sustain yourself, and wait until afternoon”; so both of them ate.

esv.text: And on the fifth day he arose early in the morning to depart. And the girl’s father said, “Strengthen your heart and wait until the day declines.” So they ate, both of them.

cnv.text: 到了第五天，他清早起來要走；那女子的父親說：“請吃點餅增添心力，等到日頭西斜再走吧。”於是他們耽延，直到日頭西斜；二人一同吃飯。

ccb.text: 第五天清早起来，他准备回家，岳父对他说：“吃点东西，太阳偏西再走吧。”于是，二人一同吃饭。
